name: Spaghetti All'amatriciana
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Diced lean bacon (or Grated prosciutto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil and butter in a pan. Gently fry the diced bacon for 5 minutes until golden brown.
2. Add chopped tomatoes, pimento, and cook over moderate heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Cook spaghetti according to package directions and drain well.
4. Mix spaghetti with half of the sauce.
5. Top with the remaining sauce and sprinkle with grated prosciutto or cheese before serving.
